title: Docking Bay 72
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Docking Bay 72''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] located in [[Xucphra City|Zalxuc City]] on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]''
